feed.title: Unsplash
feed.subtitle: Combined Unsplash feed: blog, status, API changelog, and (with an UNSPLASH_ACCESS_KEY) fresh wallpaper photos.

entry.title: Narrow dirt path winding through lush green forest from above. — by Kristaps Ungurs
entry.content: Photo by Kristaps Ungurs. Narrow dirt path winding through lush green forest from above.. https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1784088912709-59a67c0c76f4?crop=entropy&cs=tinysrgb&fit=max&fm=jpg&ixid=M3w5OTc0NDF8MHwxfHRvcGljfHxibzhqUUtUYUUwWXx8fHx8Mnx8MTc4NDIwNjE1N3w&ixlib=rb-4.1.0&q=80&w=1080
entry.dc:creator: Wallpapers

entry.title: Verdant forest with winding path and two dark lakes. — by Kristaps Ungurs
entry.content: Photo by Kristaps Ungurs. Verdant forest with winding path and two dark lakes.. https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1784088912966-739c166ffb4e?crop=entropy&cs=tinysrgb&fit=max&fm=jpg&ixid=M3w5OTc0NDF8MHwxfHRvcGljfHxibzhqUUtUYUUwWXx8fHx8Mnx8MTc4NDEzNjI5MHw&ixlib=rb-4.1.0&q=80&w=1080
entry.dc:creator: Wallpapers

entry.title: Sunlight bursts through green palm fronds on a bright day. — by Bro Takes Photos
entry.content: Photo by Bro Takes Photos. Sunlight bursts through green palm fronds on a bright day.. https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1784050976433-476f59bdedec?crop=entropy&cs=tinysrgb&fit=max&fm=jpg&ixid=M3w5OTc0NDF8MHwxfHRvcGljfHxibzhqUUtUYUUwWXx8fHx8Mnx8MTc4NDIwNjE1N3w&ixlib=rb-4.1.0&q=80&w=1080

Three Sisters and Elephant Rock, Haystack Rock at Sunset, Sunset in New Zealand, Blue Hour, Sand Beach with Rock, Ocean Wallpaper, Waves, Sunset Beach, Moody Wallpaper, Dusk. https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1783717408828-56975eb28099?crop=entropy&cs=tinysrgb&fit=max&fm=jpg&ixid=M3w5OTc0NDF8MHwxfHRvcGljfHxibzhqUUtUYUUwWXx8fHx8Mnx8MTc4MzkyOTQ5NXw&ixlib=rb-4.1.0&q=80&w=1080

Orange, red, and purple fluid streaks on black background. https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1783696630612-285f89e9945b?crop=entropy&cs=tinysrgb&fit=max&fm=jpg&ixid=M3w5OTc0NDF8MHwxfHRvcGljfHxibzhqUUtUYUUwWXx8fHx8Mnx8MTc4MzkyOTQ5NXw&ixlib=rb-4.1.0&q=80&w=1080

entry.title: Title: Wheat Field with Cypresses, Artist: Vincent van Gogh (Dutch, Zundert 1853–1890 Auvers-sur-Oise), Date: 1889, Medium: Oil on canvas, Dimensions: 28 13/16 × 36 3/4 in. (73.2 × 93.4 cm), Classific
entry.content: Photo by The Metropolitan Museum of Art. Title: Wheat Field with Cypresses, Artist: Vincent van Gogh (Dutch, Zundert 1853–1890 Auvers-sur-Oise), Date: 1889, Medium: Oil on canvas, Dimensions: 28 13/16 × 36 3/4 in. (73.2 × 93.4 cm), Classification: Paintings, Credit Line: Purchase, The Annenberg Foundation Gift, 1993, Object Number: 1993.132, Curatorial Department: European Paintings. https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1783676167814-13057079dd43?crop=entropy&cs=tinysrgb&fit=max&fm=jpg&ixid=M3w5OTc
entry.dc:creator: Wallpapers

entry.title: 9 Billion Downloads
entry.content: Not bad for a free image library.
entry.dc:creator: Unsplash Blog

entry.content: Real art. Real artifacts. Real history.
entry.dc:creator: Unsplash Blog

entry.title: Behind 2 Billion with Matthew Stephenson
entry.content: We caught up with contributor Matthew Stephenson on how it feels to have reached 2 billion views on Unsplash.
entry.dc:creator: Unsplash Blog

entry.content: 20 incredible submissions from the past month.

entry.title: Increased error rate
entry.content: Mar 2 , 20:25 UTC Resolved - This incident has been resolved. Mar 2 , 17:58 UTC Monitoring - A fix has been implemented and we are monitoring the results. Mar 2 , 14:21 UTC Investigating - We are currently investigating this issue.
entry.dc:creator: Unsplash Status

entry.title: Unsplash Around the World: Greece 🇬🇷
entry.content: Through the lens of 4 Greece-based contributors
entry.dc:creator: Unsplash Blog

entry.title: Top 20 Images on Unsplash from January 2026
entry.content: 20 incredible submissions from the past month.
entry.dc:creator: Unsplash Blog

entry.title: Read how we took a gondola to the end of the Earth: https://www.intricateexplorer.com/adventures/624 — by Intricate Explorer
entry.content: Photo by Intricate Explorer. Read how we took a gondola to the end of the Earth: https://www.intricateexplorer.com/adventures/624. https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1769031184552-43a1947a4c49?crop=entropy&cs=tinysrgb&fit=max&fm=jpg&ixid=M3w5OTc0NDF8MHwxfHRvcGljfHxibzhqUUtUYUUwWXx8fHx8Mnx8MTc4NDIwNjE1N3w&ixlib=rb-4.1.0&q=80&w=1080
entry.dc:creator: Wallpapers

entry.title: AWS us-east issues
entry.content: Oct 20 , 22:45 UTC Resolved - This incident has been resolved. Oct 20 , 19:29 UTC Update - We are continuing to work on a fix for this issue. Oct 20 , 19:23 UTC Identified - We are seeing networking errors in our AWS dependent services.
entry.dc:creator: Unsplash Status

entry.title: Partial search outage
entry.content: Oct 9 , 15:50 UTC Resolved - This incident has been resolved. Oct 9 , 15:20 UTC Monitoring - A fix has been implemented and we are monitoring the results. Oct 9 , 12:03 UTC Investigating - We are currently investigating the elevated error rates observed at our search cluster.
entry.dc:creator: Unsplash Status

entry.title: Performance issues after DB upgrade
entry.content: May 20 , 18:25 UTC Resolved - This incident has been resolved. May 20 , 11:20 UTC Monitoring - A fix has been implemented and we are monitoring the results. May 20 , 07:44 UTC Investigating - We are currently investigating this issue.
entry.dc:creator: Unsplash Status

entry.title: Performance issues during database upgrade
entry.content: May 19 , 21:40 UTC Resolved - This incident has been resolved. May 19 , 21:37 UTC Monitoring - A fix has been implemented and we are monitoring the results. May 19 , 16:47 UTC Identified - We are seeing performance degradation during search due to a database upgrade.
entry.dc:creator: Unsplash Status

entry.title: Illustration access enabled for all API partners
entry.content: All API partners can now access illustrations. Previously, this required a specific permission. Endpoints that return photos will now include illustrations as well.
entry.dc:creator: API Changelog

entry.title: Database upgrade
entry.content: Nov 2 , 18:00 UTC Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed. Nov 2 , 16:14 UTC Verifying - Verification is currently underway for the maintenance items. Nov 2 , 12:00 UTC In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary. Oct 28 , 20:53 UTC Scheduled - The API will be in read-only mode; read operations (e.g., search) will remain unaffected however anything requiring a write will be unavailable until the upgrade is complete.
entry.dc:creator: Unsplash Status

entry.title: Removal of order_by from GET /photos
entry.content: The photos Editorial feed will no longer support the order_by parameter, instead only returning photos in the latest order (the existing default).
entry.dc:creator: API Changelog

entry.title: Unsplash Source sunset
entry.content: Unsplash Source has been officially unsupported since its deprecation in 2021. As part of the final sunsetting, we will first wind down by disabling the search feature, and in the coming weeks turn off the application entirely.
entry.dc:creator: API Changelog

entry.title: Elevated errors
entry.content: Apr 22 , 14:11 UTC Resolved - This incident has been resolved. Apr 22 , 14:07 UTC Monitoring - A fix has been implemented and we are monitoring the results. Apr 22 , 14:03 UTC Identified - The issue has been identified and a fix is being implemented.
entry.dc:creator: Unsplash Status

entry.title: Performance issues
entry.content: Feb 6 , 17:22 UTC Resolved - This incident has been resolved. Feb 6 , 16:41 UTC Investigating - We are currently investigating this issue.
entry.dc:creator: Unsplash Status

entry.title: Database maintenance
entry.content: Dec 24 , 18:00 UTC Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed. Dec 24 , 15:00 UTC In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary. Dec 22 , 18:39 UTC Scheduled - We will be undergoing scheduled maintenance during this time.
entry.dc:creator: Unsplash Status

entry.title: Elevated API errors
entry.content: Dec 1 , 13:14 UTC Resolved - This incident has been resolved. Nov 30 , 18:32 UTC Monitoring - A fix has been implemented and we are monitoring the results. Nov 30 , 17:29 UTC Update - We are continuing to investigate this issue. Nov 30 , 15:14 UTC Investigating - API is currently experiencing intermittent elevated error rates and slow response times. We are currently investigating.
entry.dc:creator: Unsplash Status

entry.title: Increased error rates and connection timeouts
entry.content: Feb 24 , 17:54 UTC Resolved - This incident has been resolved. Feb 24 , 17:16 UTC Monitoring - A fix has been implemented and we are monitoring the results. Feb 24 , 16:54 UTC Investigating - We are experiencing connectivity due to issues at our upstream hosting provider.
entry.dc:creator: Unsplash Status

entry.title: API database maintenance
entry.content: Dec 28 , 18:47 UTC Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed. Dec 28 , 18:19 UTC Verifying - Upgrade process has completed; API and website will be coming back online. Dec 28 , 16:53 UTC Update - Upgrades are still in progress. We will continue to post updates as necessary. Dec 28 , 16:01 UTC In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary. Dec 21 , 21:34 UTC Scheduled - API and website will be unavailable during this time as we p
entry.dc:creator: Unsplash Status

entry.title: Unsplash Source being deprecated
entry.content: Unsplash Source is being deprecated. Existing uses will continue to work, however for new projects use the full Unsplash API .
entry.dc:creator: API Changelog

entry.title: Tags property from search endpoints deprecation
entry.content: The tags property from the /search and /search/photos endpoint is deprecated and will eventually be removed. This was an undocumented field and is superseded by tags_preview
entry.dc:creator: API Changelog

entry.title: Elevated error rate
entry.content: Apr 30 , 14:44 UTC Resolved - This incident has been resolved. Apr 30 , 14:26 UTC Monitoring - A fix has been implemented and we are monitoring the results. Apr 30 , 14:22 UTC Identified - The issue has been identified and a fix is being implemented. Apr 30 , 13:50 UTC Update - We are continuing to investigate this issue. Apr 30 , 13:38 UTC Investigating - We are currently investigating this issue.
entry.dc:creator: Unsplash Status

entry.title: GET /collections/featured removal
entry.content: Following up on its deprecation in September, GET /collections/featured has been removed.
entry.dc:creator: API Changelog

entry.title: Query string added to photo download_location URL
entry.content: Query string parameters have been added to the photo’s download_location URL. This may cause issues for client implementations adding their access token to the URL via string concatenation.
entry.dc:creator: API Changelog

entry.title: BlurHash added to photo objects
entry.content: All photo objects from the Unsplash API now include a blur_hash string. This is a compact representation of an image which can be used as a placeholder before the real image loads.
entry.dc:creator: API Changelog

entry.title: Added topic endpoints
entry.content: We have added new endpoints for topics:
entry.dc:creator: API Changelog

entry.title: Collections ID change and featured deprecation
entry.content: Two changes to the Collections API:
entry.dc:creator: API Changelog

entry.title: Support for languages beta
entry.content: We are adding support for non-english input languages to the search endpoint.
entry.dc:creator: API Changelog

entry.title: Dynamic Client Registration Support Added
entry.content: For decentralized applications, like open source CMSs WordPress and Ghost, we’ve added support for dynamic client registration, which allows developers to grant individual API keys to users with a user-friendly signup process.
entry.dc:creator: API Changelog

entry.title: User likes statistics deprecation
entry.content: The ‘likes’ data in the /users/:username/statistics response has been deprecated. The total value will be returning 0 going forward, with the entire fragment (i.e., including historical info) to be removed in the near future.
entry.dc:creator: API Changelog

entry.title: Deprecation of ordering by ‘popular’
entry.content: We are deprecating the option to order photos by popular on all endpoints (e.g., GET /photos ). While the functionality will still exist in the immediate future, it will be soon be removed.
entry.dc:creator: API Changelog

entry.title: Content filtering
entry.content: We’ve added a new section to the API documentation to publicly clarify our content safety guidelines :
entry.dc:creator: API Changelog

entry.title: New filtering and ordering options
entry.content: GET /search/photos adds support for orientation, dominant color filtering, and relevancy vs latest ordering:
entry.dc:creator: API Changelog

entry.title: Deprecated endpoint EOL: curated photos, old search, photo stats
entry.content: Three deprecated endpoints have been removed:
entry.dc:creator: API Changelog

entry.title: Curated Collections removal
entry.content: The deprecated Curated Collection endpoints have been removed. This includes:
entry.dc:creator: API Changelog

entry.title: API parameter resizing deprecation
entry.content: The custom cropping and resizing parameters accepted by the get a photo , get a random photo , and get a user endpoints are being deprecated and replaced instead with dynamic image URLs which are capable of more resizing and cropping options.
entry.dc:creator: API Changelog

entry.title: Abbreviation of top photos in users search and user endpoints
entry.content: For performance reasons we are removing some of the deeply-nested photo objects returned in the search/users and users/:username endpoints.
entry.dc:creator: API Changelog

entry.title: Categories removal
entry.content: Categories endpoints have been removed.
entry.dc:creator: API Changelog

entry.title: Curated Collections deprecation
entry.content: Curated Collections are now deprecated. This includes endpoints:
entry.dc:creator: API Changelog

entry.title: Abbreviation of current_user_collections
entry.content: For performance reasons we are removing some of the deeply-nested objects returned in the current_user_collections photo attribute. current_user_collections returns a list of collection objects, which will no longer include the user or cover_photo information.
entry.dc:creator: API Changelog

entry.title: Categories EOL
entry.content: Categories endpoints won’t yet 404, but are returning empty data structures. e.g., /categories/:id/photos => []
entry.dc:creator: API Changelog

entry.title: Instagram username now public
entry.content: Both full and abbreviated user responses now include the instagram_username attribute without requiring the read_user scope.
entry.dc:creator: API Changelog

entry.title: Filter photo search results by orientation
entry.content: The /search and /search/photos/ endpoints will now accept an orientation parameter, and return photos only matching that. Valid values are landscape , portrait , and squarish .
entry.dc:creator: API Changelog

entry.title: Updated API Guidelines
entry.content: We’ve updated the official Unsplash API Guidelines to include two new technical guidelines for all API applications:
entry.dc:creator: API Changelog

entry.title: Existing deprecations
entry.content: Some endpoints and behaviour have already been deprecated, and are no longer officially supported:
entry.dc:creator: API Changelog

entry.title: Reactor online. Initializing API changelog.
entry.content: We’ll be posting changes to the API starting from here. You can always find the current state of our API at https://unsplash.com/documentation
entry.dc:creator: API Changelog
